strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience across fintech-adjacent domains
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, observability mindset
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems track record at the scale and stakes the role requires
Limited depth in regulated fintech infrastructure (credit risk, liquidity, real-time trade decisioning)

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and low-latency engineering background

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior individual contributor with broad full-stack, distributed-systems, and craftsmanship credentials, plus emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling via re:cinq. However, the CTO role demands proven executive leadership, organizational scaling from 10 to 30+, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech — areas where the resume shows limited evidence. Fit is stronger as a senior/staff engineer or tech lead than as a venture-backed scale-up CTO.
